texto: You must really want to win with all of your heart! Plan your race
autor: do not ever get side tracked. Focus on your goal - “the finishing line”!
explicacao: Orientação direta de do not ever get side tracked. Focus on your goal - “the finishing line”! sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “You must really want to win with all of your heart! Plan your race” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, lucas-remmerswaal, really, útil em momentos de reflexao.
